description: Display or set the system's host name.

option.name: --domain
tip: display the name of the DNS domain if possible

option.name: --fqdn
tip: display the FQDN (Fully Qualified Domain Name) (default)

option.name: --ip-address
tip: display the network address(es) of the host

option.name: --short
tip: display the short hostname (the portion before the first dot) if possible
